ordered_decision_flow: resolve whether request is for signed-in user, another surfer or hypothetical scenario
resolve explicit profile changes and temporary session overrides
apply hard family and design exclusions
resolve rider dimensions, fitness, age and frequency where relevant
resolve wave type, power, size and consistency
resolve goal: wave count, progression, speed, manoeuvres, control, travel or quiver gap
set broad dimension and volume guardrails
rank canonical models using governed Board DNA
check exact regional inventory only after suitability
offer exact canonical size search handoff
hard_rules: hard exclusions are not weights and cannot be outweighed
availability is a tie-breaker among suitable boards, not a suitability signal
no recommendation is better than an unsafe recommendation
current-message facts override saved profile for the session
saved profile changes require explicit confirmation
